enabled.label: Enable Feishu CLI user tools
enabled.help: Uses the official lark-cli with user identity. Separate from the Feishu bot/channel plugin.

command.label: lark-cli command
command.help: Executable used for user-identity Feishu actions.

profile.label: CLI profile
profile.help: Optional lark-cli profile name for user auth context.

timeoutMs.label: Command timeout (ms)
timeoutMs.help: Timeout used for lark-cli status and tool calls.
